name: G-3 rule ID namespacing: operator additions in _operator/<my-org>/ must start with the <my-org>- prefix
command:
mkdir -p tree/_operator/acme && printf 'source:
  id: o
rules:
  - id: foo-001
' > tree/_operator/acme/c.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --check-id-namespacing 2>err.txt; grep -q 'rules under _operator/acme/ must start with acme- prefix' err.txt && echo operator_prefix 1>&2
